result.stdout:
Description:
  A network bandwidth testing tool

Usage:
  nperf [options]

Options:
  -s, --server                     Start the application in server mode
  -a, --address <address>          The IP address to connect to or listen on, can be omitted in server mode [default: 0.0.0.0]
  -p, --port <port>                The port to connect to or listen on [default: 5000]
  -b, --buffer-size <buffer-size>  The buffer size to use for sending and receiving data [default: 10485760]
  -v, --verbose                    Enable verbose logging
  --version                        Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information

  -b, --buffer-size <buffer-size>  The buffer size to use for sending and receiving data [default: 10485760]
  -v, --verbose                    Enable verbose logging
  --version                        Show version information
